description: Recto: Legal query in the hand of Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi addressed to Maimonides, who was active in Egypt ca. 1168–1204 CE. Concerning partners in a business venture; the traveling partner returned with safflower (ʿuṣfur) but there was no market for it, so it was kept for a time until there should be a market for it. During this period, the traveling partner died without a will in the Jewish courts, leaving minor children. The case is quite convoluted and there follow more details.
description_he: פנים: שאלה משפטית בכתב יד משה בן לוי הלוי לרמב"ם, על שותפים בעסק שהשותף הנוסע חזר עם זרעי חריע ומת ללא צוואה בבתי הדין היהודיים תוך השארת ילדים קטנים; בערך 1168-1204 לסה"נ
